---
title: "Section 1: Load SEA-AD MTG Data"
author: "Konda Divya Reddy"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
    code_folding: show
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=TRUE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE)
```

## 1. Load libraries
```{r libraries}
library(Seurat)
library(SeuratDisk)
library(tidyverse)
```

## 2. Set paths
```{r paths}
h5ad_path    <- "/N/scratch/dikonda/seaad_scrna/data/SEAAD_MTG_RNAseq_all-nuclei.2024-02-13.h5ad"
h5seurat_path <- sub(".h5ad$", ".h5seurat", h5ad_path)
out_dir      <- "/N/scratch/dikonda/seaad_scrna/results"
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
```

## 3. Convert H5AD to H5Seurat
```{r convert}
if (!file.exists(h5seurat_path)) {
  message("Converting H5AD to H5Seurat...")
  Convert(h5ad_path, dest = "h5seurat", overwrite = FALSE)
  message("Done.")
} else {
  message("H5Seurat already exists — skipping.")
}
```

## 4. Load Seurat object
```{r load}
seurat_obj <- LoadH5Seurat(
  h5seurat_path,
  assays     = "RNA",
  reductions = FALSE,
  graphs     = FALSE
)
cat("Genes:", nrow(seurat_obj), "\n")
cat("Nuclei:", ncol(seurat_obj), "\n")
```

## 5. Inspect metadata
```{r metadata}
cat("Metadata columns:\n")
print(colnames(seurat_obj@meta.data))
head(seurat_obj@meta.data)
```

## 6. Check key fields
```{r key-fields}
key_fields <- c("Donor ID", "Diagnosis", "Sex", "Age at Death",
                "Braak Stage", "CERAD score")
for (field in key_fields) {
  if (field %in% colnames(seurat_obj@meta.data)) {
    cat(sprintf("\n%s:\n", field))
    print(table(seurat_obj@meta.data[[field]], useNA = "always"))
  }
}
```

## 7. Donor summary
```{r donor-summary}
seurat_obj@meta.data %>%
  group_by(`Donor ID`, Diagnosis) %>%
  summarise(n_nuclei = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(Diagnosis, `Donor ID`) %>%
  print()
```

## 8. Save outputs
```{r save}
seurat_obj@meta.data %>%
  rownames_to_column("nucleus_id") %>%
  write_csv(file.path(out_dir, "01_metadata_summary.csv"))

saveRDS(seurat_obj, file.path(out_dir, "01_seurat_loaded.rds"))
cat("Saved.\n")
```

## Session info
```{r session}
sessionInfo()
```
